# Copilot Instructions

## README ↔ index.html Sync

`README.md` mirrors the content of `index.html`. When editing either file, **always update both**:

| README.md | index.html |
|-----------|------------|
| `# Heading` | `<h1>`, `<h2>` |
| `*italic*` | `<i>` |
| `- list item` | `<li>` |
| `[text](url)` | `<a href="url">` |

Keep the structure, sections, copy, and links identical across both files.
